CheckTitle: 检查RDS 实例s are using non-default ports.
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks/AWS Security Best Practices
Description: Checks if an instance uses a port other than the default port of the 数据库 engine. The control fails if the RDS 实例 uses the default port.
Risk: Using a default 数据库 port exposes the instance to potential 安全漏洞, as attackers are more likely to target known, commonly-used ports. This may result in 未授权访问 to the 数据库 or increased susceptibility to automated attacks.

Recommendation.Text: Modify the RDS 实例 to use a non-default port, and ensure that the 安全组 permits access to the new port.
